name: MONO
subtitle: Specialty Coffee
tagline: Single-origin coffee sourced directly from farms, roasted in 15kg batches, brewed with obsessive precision.
registeredAddress: 47 Redchurch Street, Shoreditch, London E2 7DJ, United Kingdom

menuItems.name: Ethiopia Yirgacheffe
menuItems.desc: Washed process from the Gedeb district. Floral, tea-like body with a clean citrus finish.

menuItems.name: Colombia El Paraiso
menuItems.desc: Double anaerobic fermentation from Cauca. Juicy and complex with a syrupy body.

menuItems.name: Sumatra Mandheling
menuItems.desc: Wet-hulled process from Northern Sumatra. Earthy, full-bodied with low acidity.

menuItems.name: Guatemala Antigua
menuItems.desc: Volcanic soil grown in the Antigua valley. Balanced with a smooth, buttery finish.

roasteryDescription: Every bean is roasted in 15kg batches. 12 roast profiles. 72 hours of rest before first brew.
footerTagline: Specialty coffee roasters. Direct trade. Small batch. Obsessive precision.
